nasb.text: so that you may approve the things that are excellent, in order to be sincere and blameless until the day of Christ;

esv.text: so that you may approve what is excellent, and so be pure and blameless for the day of Christ,

cnv.text: 使你們可以辨別是非，成為真誠無可指摘的人，直到基督的日子，

ccb.text: 使你们知道怎样择善而从，做诚实无过的人，一直到基督再来的日子，

csbs.text: 使你们能分辨是非，好在基督的日子里是纯洁、无可指责的，
